hero.paragraph: Trusted manufacturer of belt, screw, roller, slat-chain, bucket, loading and packaging conveyors. Engineered in our Coimbatore plant for food processing, packaging, manufacturing, engineering and material-handling industries.

about.paragraph1: Icon Conveyors is a trusted manufacturer and supplier of conveyor systems and material handling equipment, headquartered in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. Established in 2017 as a sole proprietorship, we specialise in high-quality conveyor solutions designed to improve industrial productivity and operational efficiency.
about.paragraph2: With a dedicated, skilled team and a technically advanced manufacturing unit, we serve food processing, packaging, manufacturing, engineering and material-handling industries — every system precision-built to meet customer-specific needs.
strengths: Customized conveyor solutions for every line
Competitive pricing without compromise on quality
about.mission: To provide high-quality, innovative and cost-effective conveyor systems that enhance productivity and meet the evolving needs of our customers across every industry we serve.
about.vision: To become a leading name in the conveyor manufacturing industry by delivering reliable material handling solutions and building long-term customer relationships rooted in trust and engineering excellence.

industries.subheading: From food-grade hygiene to heavy-engineering durability — we engineer the right machine for the right floor.

items.title: Food Processing
items.desc: Hygienic SS belt, modular belt and slat-chain conveyors for bakeries, dairies, poultry and ready-meal lines.

items.title: Packaging
items.desc: Roller, modular belt, bagging machines and gross weighers feeding pack-out, sealing and palletising stations.

items.title: Manufacturing
items.desc: Assembly-line conveyors, slat-chain and aluminium-profile belts engineered for high-volume production floors.

items.title: Engineering
items.desc: Custom material-handling solutions for foundry, automotive, machine-shop and heavy engineering plants.

items.title: Material Handling
items.desc: Truck loading, bag stacker, bucket elevators and segregation lines for warehouses and logistics hubs.

items.title: Agriculture & Allied
items.desc: Cleated and screw conveyors moving grain, seed, feed and fertiliser at farm-to-mill scale.

items.title: Custom Engineering
items.text: Every conveyor is sized to your material, throughput and floor — no off-the-shelf compromise.

items.title: Built to Last
items.text: Heavy-gauge frames, premium pulleys and food-grade or abrasion-grade belt options for every application.

items.title: Low Maintenance
items.text: Smart access panels, sealed bearings and modular sections reduce downtime to a minimum.

items.title: Precise Installation
items.text: Site survey, fabrication, install and commissioning handled end-to-end by our in-house team.

items.title: Pan-India Delivery
items.text: Dispatch from Coimbatore to every state with logistics and on-site rigging support.

items.title: Lifetime Support
items.text: AMC contracts, rapid spares and an engineer-on-call for every system we ship.

quality.headingLead: Built to a standard you can

cards.title: Quality Policy
cards.text: We deliver products and services that meet or exceed customer expectations — strict quality control at every stage of production, ISO compliance, and continuous improvement in process, technology and workforce skills.

cards.title: 10+ Years Experience
cards.text: Over ten years designing, manufacturing, supplying and installing industrial material-handling systems and conveyor solutions — projects executed reliably across food, packaging, manufacturing and engineering sectors.

cards.title: One-Year Warranty
cards.text: Every product carries a one-year warranty against manufacturing defects and workmanship under normal operating conditions. Any proven defect is repaired or replaced as per company policy.

clients.heading: Trusted by industry leaders across India

items.quote: Icon's modular belt line replaced two manual stations on our poultry floor. Throughput jumped 32% in the first month — and zero hygiene complaints since.
items.name: Karthik R.

items.quote: We needed a bucket elevator with a 14-metre lift and zero spillage. They designed, built and commissioned it in under 8 weeks. Outstanding.
items.name: Suresh N.

items.quote: The screw conveyor handling our fertiliser blend has been running 18 months without a single service call. That's engineering you can trust.
items.name: Vignesh S.

contact.paragraph: Share a quick brief — material, throughput and floor space — and our engineers will revert in 24 hours with a budgetary proposal and layout sketch.

footer.blurb: Trusted Coimbatore-based manufacturer of conveyor systems and packaging machines. Optimising material flow for India's industries since 2017 · ISO 9001:2015 certified.
